pkg.name: angular
pkg.description:
The Nx Plugin for Angular contains executors, generators, and utilities for managing Angular applications and libraries within an Nx workspace. It provides: 

- Integration with libraries such as Storybook, Jest, ESLint, Tailwind CSS, Playwright and Cypress. 

- Generators to help scaffold code quickly (like: Micro Frontends, Libraries, both internal to your codebase and publishable to npm) 

- Single Component Application Modules (SCAMs) 

- NgRx helpers. 

- Utilities for automatic workspace refactoring.

/nx-api/angular/documents/overview.name: Overview
/nx-api/angular/documents/overview.description:
The Nx Plugin for Angular contains executors, generators, and utilities for managing Angular applications and libraries within an Nx workspace. It provides: 

- Integration with libraries such as Storybook, Jest, ESLint, Tailwind CSS, Playwright and Cypress. 

- Generators to help scaffold code quickly (like: Micro Frontends, Libraries, both internal to your codebase and publishable to npm) 

- Single Component Application Modules (SCAMs) 

- NgRx helpers. 

- Utilities for automatic workspace refactoring.

/nx-api/angular/documents/angular-nx-ver.name: Angular and Nx Version Matrix
/nx-api/angular/documents/angular-nx-ver.description:
The Nx Plugin for Angular contains executors, generators, and utilities for managing Angular applications and libraries within an Nx workspace. It provides: 

- Integration with libraries such as Storybook, Jest, ESLint, Tailwind CSS, Playwright and Cypress. 

- Generators to help scaffold code quickly (like: Micro Frontends, Libraries, both internal to your codebase and publishable to npm) 

- Single Component Application Modules (SCAMs) 

- NgRx helpers. 

- Utilities for automatic workspace refactoring.

/nx-api/angular/executors/delegate-build.description: Delegates the build to a different target while supporting incremental builds.
/nx-api/angular/executors/delegate-build.name: delegate-build

/nx-api/angular/executors/ng-packagr-lit.description:
Builds an Angular library with support for incremental builds.

This executor is meant to be used with buildable libraries in an incremental build scenario. It is similar to the `@nx/angular:package` executor but it only produces ESM2022 bundles.
/nx-api/angular/executors/ng-packagr-lit.name: ng-packagr-lite

/nx-api/angular/executors/package.description:
Builds and packages an Angular library producing an output following the Angular Package Format (APF) to be distributed as an NPM package.

This executor is a drop-in replacement for the `@angular-devkit/build-angular:ng-packagr` with additional support for incremental builds.
/nx-api/angular/executors/package.name: package

/nx-api/angular/executors/module-federat.description: Serves host [Module Federation](https://module-federation.io/) applications ([webpack](https://webpack.js.org/)-based) allowing to specify which remote applications should be served with the host.
/nx-api/angular/executors/module-federat.name: module-federation-dev-server

/nx-api/angular/executors/module-federat.description: The module-federation-ssr-dev-server executor is reserved exclusively for use with host SSR Module Federation applications. It allows the user to specify which remote applications should be served with the host.
/nx-api/angular/executors/module-federat.name: module-federation-dev-ssr

/nx-api/angular/executors/application.description: Builds an Angular application using [esbuild](https://esbuild.github.io/) with integrated SSR and prerendering capabilities. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.0.0_.
/nx-api/angular/executors/application.name: application

/nx-api/angular/executors/extract-i18n.description: Extracts i18n messages from source code.
/nx-api/angular/executors/extract-i18n.name: extract-i18n

/nx-api/angular/executors/dev-server.description: Serves an Angular application using [webpack](https://webpack.js.org/) when the build target is using a webpack-based executor, or [Vite](https://vitejs.dev/) when the build target uses an [esbuild](https://esbuild.github.io/)-based executor.
/nx-api/angular/executors/dev-server.name: dev-server

/nx-api/angular/executors/webpack-server.description: Builds a server Angular application using [webpack](https://webpack.js.org/). This executor is a drop-in replacement for the `@angular-devkit/build-angular:server` builder provided by the Angular CLI. It is usually used in tandem with the `@nx/angular:webpack-browser` executor when your Angular application uses a custom webpack configuration.
/nx-api/angular/executors/webpack-server.name: webpack-server

/nx-api/angular/generators/add-linting.description: Adds linting configuration to an Angular project.
/nx-api/angular/generators/add-linting.name: add-linting

/nx-api/angular/generators/component-cyp.description: Creates a Cypress spec for a UI component that has a story.
/nx-api/angular/generators/component-cyp.name: component-cypress-spec

/nx-api/angular/generators/component-sto.description: Creates a stories.ts file for a component.
/nx-api/angular/generators/component-sto.name: component-story

/nx-api/angular/generators/component-tes.description: Creates a cypress component test file for a component.
/nx-api/angular/generators/component-tes.name: component-test

/nx-api/angular/generators/convert-to-ap.description: Converts projects to use the `@nx/angular:application` executor or the `@angular-devkit/build-angular:application` builder. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.0.0_.
/nx-api/angular/generators/convert-to-ap.name: convert-to-application-executor

/nx-api/angular/generators/federate-modu.description: Create a federated module, which is exposed by a remote and can be subsequently loaded by a host.
/nx-api/angular/generators/federate-modu.name: federate-module

/nx-api/angular/generators/library-secon.description: Creates a secondary entry point for an Angular publishable library.
/nx-api/angular/generators/library-secon.name: library-secondary-entry-point

/nx-api/angular/generators/remote.description: Generate a Remote Angular Module Federation Application.
/nx-api/angular/generators/remote.name: remote

/nx-api/angular/generators/move.description: Moves an Angular application or library to another folder within the workspace and updates the project configuration.
/nx-api/angular/generators/move.name: move

/nx-api/angular/generators/convert-to-wi.description:
Converts an old micro frontend configuration to use the new withModuleFederation helper. It will run successfully if the following conditions are met: 
 - Is either a host or remote application 
 - Shared npm package configurations have not been modified 
 - Name used to identify the Micro Frontend application matches the project name 

{% callout type="warning" title="Overrides" %}This generator will overwrite your webpack config. If you have additional custom configuration in your config file, it will be lost!{% /callout %}
/nx-api/angular/generators/convert-to-wi.name: convert-to-with-mf

/nx-api/angular/generators/host.description: Generate a Host Angular Module Federation Application.
/nx-api/angular/generators/host.name: host

/nx-api/angular/generators/ng-add.description: Migrates an Angular CLI workspace to Nx or adds the Angular plugin to an Nx workspace.
/nx-api/angular/generators/ng-add.name: ng-add

/nx-api/angular/generators/ngrx.description: Adds NgRx support to an application or library.
/nx-api/angular/generators/ngrx.name: ngrx

/nx-api/angular/generators/ngrx-feature-.description: Adds an NgRx Feature Store to an application or library.
/nx-api/angular/generators/ngrx-feature-.name: ngrx-feature-store

/nx-api/angular/generators/ngrx-root-sto.description: Adds an NgRx Root Store to an application.
/nx-api/angular/generators/ngrx-root-sto.name: ngrx-root-store

/nx-api/angular/generators/scam-to-stand.description: Convert an existing Single Component Angular Module (SCAM) to a Standalone Component.
/nx-api/angular/generators/scam-to-stand.name: scam-to-standalone

/nx-api/angular/generators/scam.description: Generate a component with an accompanying Single Component Angular Module (SCAM).
/nx-api/angular/generators/scam.name: scam

/nx-api/angular/generators/scam-directiv.description: Generate a directive with an accompanying Single Component Angular Module (SCAM).
/nx-api/angular/generators/scam-directiv.name: scam-directive

/nx-api/angular/generators/scam-pipe.description: Generate a pipe with an accompanying Single Component Angular Module (SCAM).
/nx-api/angular/generators/scam-pipe.name: scam-pipe

/nx-api/angular/generators/setup-mf.description: Generate a Module Federation configuration for a given Angular application.
/nx-api/angular/generators/setup-mf.name: setup-mf

/nx-api/angular/generators/setup-ssr.description: Generate Angular Universal (SSR) setup for an Angular application.
/nx-api/angular/generators/setup-ssr.name: setup-ssr

/nx-api/angular/generators/setup-tailwin.description: Configures Tailwind CSS for an application or a buildable/publishable library.
/nx-api/angular/generators/setup-tailwin.name: setup-tailwind

/nx-api/angular/generators/stories.description: Creates stories/specs for all components declared in a project.
/nx-api/angular/generators/stories.name: stories

/nx-api/angular/generators/storybook-con.description: Adds Storybook configuration to a project.
/nx-api/angular/generators/storybook-con.name: storybook-configuration

/nx-api/angular/generators/cypress-compo.description: Setup Cypress component testing for a project.
/nx-api/angular/generators/cypress-compo.name: cypress-component-configuration

schema.name: application

schema.title: Schema for Nx Application Executor
schema.description: Builds an Angular application using [esbuild](https://esbuild.github.io/) with integrated SSR and prerendering capabilities. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.0.0_.

followSymlinks.description: Allow glob patterns to follow symlink directories. This allows subdirectories of the symlink to be searched.

input.description: The input directory path in which to apply 'glob'. Defaults to the project root.

ignore.description: An array of globs to ignore.

browser.description: The full path for the browser entry point to the application, relative to the current workspace.

server.description: The full path for the server entry point to the application, relative to the current workspace.

polyfills.description: A list of polyfills to include in the build. Can be a full path for a file, relative to the current workspace or module specifier. Example: 'zone.js'.

tsConfig.description: The full path for the TypeScript configuration file, relative to the current workspace.

deployUrl.description: Customize the base path for the URLs of resources in 'index.html' and component stylesheets. This option is only necessary for specific deployment scenarios, such as with Angular Elements or when utilizing different CDN locations. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.3.0_.

scripts.description: Global scripts to be included in the build.

bundleName.description: The bundle name for this extra entry point.

inject.description: If the bundle will be referenced in the HTML file.

oneOf.description: The JavaScript/TypeScript file or package containing the file to include.

styles.description: Global styles to be included in the build.

bundleName.description: The bundle name for this extra entry point.

inject.description: If the bundle will be referenced in the HTML file.

inlineStyleLanguage.description: The stylesheet language to use for the application's inline component styles.

stylePreprocessorOptions.description: Options to pass to style preprocessors.

includePaths.description: Paths to include. Paths will be resolved to workspace root.

externalDependencies.description: Exclude the listed external dependencies from being bundled into the bundle. Instead, the created bundle relies on these dependencies to be available during runtime.

clearScreen.description: Automatically clear the terminal screen during rebuilds. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.2.0_.

optimization.description: Enables optimization of the build output. Including minification of scripts and styles, tree-shaking, dead-code elimination, inlining of critical CSS and fonts inlining. For more information, see https://angular.dev/reference/configs/workspace-config#optimization-configuration.

scripts.description: Enables optimization of the scripts output.

styles.description: Enables optimization of the styles output.

minify.description: Minify CSS definitions by removing extraneous whitespace and comments, merging identifiers and minimizing values.

inlineCritical.description: Extract and inline critical CSS definitions to improve first paint time.

removeSpecialComments.description: Remove comments in global CSS that contains '@license' or '@preserve' or that starts with '//!' or '/*!'. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.1.0_.

fonts.description: Enables optimization for fonts. This option requires internet access. `HTTPS_PROXY` environment variable can be used to specify a proxy server.

inline.description: Reduce render blocking requests by inlining external Google Fonts and Adobe Fonts CSS definitions in the application's HTML index file. This option requires internet access. `HTTPS_PROXY` environment variable can be used to specify a proxy server.

loader.description: Defines the type of loader to use with a specified file extension when used with a JavaScript `import`. `text` inlines the content as a string; `binary` inlines the content as a Uint8Array; `file` emits the file and provides the runtime location of the file; `empty` considers the content to be empty and not include it in bundles. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.1.0_.

define.description: Defines global identifiers that will be replaced with a specified constant value when found in any JavaScript or TypeScript code including libraries. The value will be used directly. String values must be put in quotes. Identifiers within Angular metadata such as Component Decorators will not be replaced. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.2.0_.

fileReplacements.description: Replace compilation source files with other compilation source files in the build.

outputPath.description: Specify the output path relative to workspace root. _Note: the object notation is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.1.0_.

base.description: Specify the output path relative to workspace root.

browser.description: The output directory name of your browser build within the output path base. Defaults to 'browser'.

server.description: The output directory name of your server build within the output path base. Defaults to 'server'.

media.description: The output directory name of your media files within the output browser directory. Defaults to 'media'.

aot.description: Build using Ahead of Time compilation.

sourceMap.description: Output source maps for scripts and styles. For more information, see https://angular.dev/reference/configs/workspace-config#source-map-configuration.

scripts.description: Output source maps for all scripts.

styles.description: Output source maps for all styles.

hidden.description: Output source maps used for error reporting tools.

baseHref.description: Base url for the application being built.

verbose.description: Adds more details to output logging.

progress.description: Log progress to the console while building.

i18nMissingTranslation.description: How to handle missing translations for i18n.

i18nDuplicateTranslation.description: How to handle duplicate translations for i18n.

localize.description: Translate the bundles in one or more locales.

oneOf.description: List of locales ID's to translate.

outputHashing.description: Define the output filename cache-busting hashing mode.

poll.description: Enable and define the file watching poll time period in milliseconds.

deleteOutputPath.description: Delete the output path before building.

preserveSymlinks.description: Do not use the real path when resolving modules. If unset then will default to `true` if NodeJS option --preserve-symlinks is set.

extractLicenses.description: Extract all licenses in a separate file.

namedChunks.description: Use file name for lazy loaded chunks.

subresourceIntegrity.description: Enables the use of subresource integrity validation.

oneOf.description: Does not generate a service worker configuration.

index.description: Configures the generation of the application's HTML index.

oneOf.description: The path of a file to use for the application's HTML index. The filename of the specified path will be used for the generated file and will be created in the root of the application's configured output path.

input.description: The path of a file to use for the application's generated HTML index.

output.description: The output path of the application's generated HTML index file. The full provided path will be used and will be considered relative to the application's configured output path.

preloadInitial.description: Generates 'preload', 'modulepreload', and 'preconnect' link elements for initial application files and resources. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.1.0_.

statsJson.description: Generates a 'stats.json' file which can be analyzed with https://esbuild.github.io/analyze/.

budgets.description: Budget thresholds to ensure parts of your application stay within boundaries which you set.

maximumWarning.description: The maximum threshold for warning relative to the baseline.

maximumError.description: The maximum threshold for error relative to the baseline.

minimumWarning.description: The minimum threshold for warning relative to the baseline.

minimumError.description: The minimum threshold for error relative to the baseline.

warning.description: The threshold for warning relative to the baseline (min & max).

error.description: The threshold for error relative to the baseline (min & max).

webWorkerTsConfig.description: TypeScript configuration for Web Worker modules.

crossOrigin.description: Define the crossorigin attribute setting of elements that provide CORS support.

allowedCommonJsDependencies.description: A list of CommonJS or AMD packages that are allowed to be used without a build time warning. Use `'*'` to allow all.

prerender.description: Prerender (SSG) pages of your application during build time.

oneOf.description: Enable prerending of pages of your application during build time.

routesFile.description: The path to a file that contains a list of all routes to prerender, separated by newlines. This option is useful if you want to prerender routes with parameterized URLs.

discoverRoutes.description: Whether the builder should process the Angular Router configuration to find all unparameterized routes and prerender them.

ssr.description: Server side render (SSR) pages of your application during runtime.

oneOf.description: Enable the server bundles to be written to disk.

entry.description: The server entry-point that when executed will spawn the web server.

appShell.description: Generates an application shell during build time.

buildLibsFromSource.description: Read buildable libraries from source instead of building them separately.

path.description: The path to the plugin. Relative to the workspace root.

options.description: The options to provide to the plugin.

oneOf.description: The path to the plugin. Relative to the workspace root.

indexHtmlTransformer.description: Path to a file exposing a default function to transform the `index.html` file. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.1.0_.

followSymlinks.description: Allow glob patterns to follow symlink directories. This allows subdirectories of the symlink to be searched.

input.description: The input directory path in which to apply 'glob'. Defaults to the project root.

ignore.description: An array of globs to ignore.

maximumWarning.description: The maximum threshold for warning relative to the baseline.

maximumError.description: The maximum threshold for error relative to the baseline.

minimumWarning.description: The minimum threshold for warning relative to the baseline.

minimumError.description: The minimum threshold for error relative to the baseline.

warning.description: The threshold for warning relative to the baseline (min & max).

error.description: The threshold for error relative to the baseline (min & max).

schema.description: Builds an Angular application using [esbuild](https://esbuild.github.io/) with integrated SSR and prerendering capabilities. _Note: this is only supported in Angular versions >= 17.0.0_.

children.name: Storybook best practices for making the most out of Nx
